underlying_goal: Build and deploy a minimalist dashboard showing Claude and Codex subscription token usage levels (with percentages) on their homepage
friction_detail: Claude initially built the dashboard against API-key usage endpoints instead of subscription usage, and couldn't obtain Claude's sessionKey cookie server-side, requiring manual user action
brief_summary: User wanted a dashboard for Claude/Codex subscription token usage with percentage meters; got a working deployed dashboard with Codex percentages but Claude percentages still require manually copying a browser cookie.
